---
title: "Schedule"
---
::: {.callout-warning}
This website is still under construction! Some sections might be empty. 
:::

<!-- Subtract 2.5h for Brazil Time -->
Provisional Schedule!

| Time |  |
| -------- | ------- |
| 11.05 - 11.45  | An Introduction to MCMC |
| 11.45 - 12.40 | The `samplr` package |
| 12.40 -  13:10 | ABS: A cognitive model using MCMC |
| 13:10 -  13:25 | Part 1 Wrap-Up |
| 13:25 - 13:55 | Break |
| 13:55 - 14:25 | Using ABC for simulation-based inference |
| 14:25 - 14:35 | Further reading on SBI |
| 14:35 - 14:55 | Future Directions |
| 14:55 - 15:00 | Final Wrap-Up |
